description: CompositionCobalt blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed collar, and bold graphic and flock print on chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash with warm water of 40 degrees Wash inside out with like colours Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on print There's no better way to flaunt your power than by donning the sun itself on your t-shirt. Advertise your strengths with the sun doing the talking with this cool blue cotton Mr. Strong T-shirt from mr. men. The colour blending chest print with a contrast coloured velvetty flock print makes this tee perfect for those who flaunt their cool attitude to perfection. A great casual wear, this T-shirt looks best with jeans and casual lifestyle footwear.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
